channel.title: BreakMate Updates

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
BreakMate v1.2.0 — Contextual Intelligence & Personal Wellness

This update introduces the Contextual Wellness Engine, making BreakMate an intelligent partner that understands your work context.

  • Contextual Tips: Advice tailored to your active app, like posture checks for coding or eye rest for browsing.
  • Calendar Sync: Automatically delays breaks if you are in a meeting.
  • End-of-Day Wind-Down: A daily summary triggered at your clock-out time.
  • Personal Goals: Set targets for focus, breaks, and movement.
  • Wellness Library: Easily manage and favorite your preferred exercises.
  • Companion Progression: Unlock new pets based on regular use, not just streaks.
  • Privacy Report: Clear details on how your data stays local on your machine.

item.title: Version 1.1.4
item.description:
BreakMate v1.1.4

## BreakMate v1.1.4 — Onboarding Persistence & Storage Stability This update addresses a long-standing issue where user onboarding data was not persisting correctly across application restarts. I've overhauled the storage architecture to ensure a more reliable experience on macOS. ### 🛠️ Core Fixes & Enhancements - **Onboarding Persistence Fix:** - Resolved the "Onboarding Loop" where users were repeatedly prompted to complete onboarding after each app restart. - Implemented a **Dual-Sync** mechanism: Critical flags (onboarding, interval, strict mode) are now mirrored to a separate, high-stability Key-Value store. If the main settings snapshot is ever stale or fails to load, the app automatically recovers state from this mirror. - **Storage Architecture Overhaul (macOS):** - **Path Relocation:** Moved the internal database from `~/Documents/breakmate_db` to `~/Library/Application Support/breakmate_db`. This aligns with macOS best practices and prevents data loss from manual user file management. - **Automatic Migration:** Added logic to detect legacy databases in the Documents folder and seamlessly move them to the new Application Support location on the first run of v1.1.4. - **Lock File Self-Healing:** Implemented automatic cleanup of stale `lock.mdb` files. This prevents the app from failing to start if a previous instance crashed or didn't release the database lock properly. - **Resilient Data Loading:** - Added robust `try-catch` blocks to the `SettingsRepository` load sequence. - Enhanced JSON decoding for complex fields (Exercises, Activity Patterns) to handle nulls or malformed strings without crashing the entire settings load. - Added explicit debug logging across the storage lifecycle for better traceability. - **Developer Experience:** - Fixed a compilation error regarding `unawaited` futures by properly importing `dart:async`. - Incremented build version to `29` for Sparkle update compatibility. ### 📄 Documentation Updates - Updated `README.md` with a new **Storage & Persistence Architecture** section. - Added project credits: "Built with Flutter by Bijith P N". ### 📦 Version Information - **Version:** 1.1.4 - **Build:** 29 - **Release Date:** May 31, 2026 ### Installation Note (macOS) Since BreakMate is not notarized by Apple, macOS may show a security warning on first launch. 1. Double-click the `BreakMate-Installer.dmg` and drag BreakMate to your Applications folder. 2. Right-click (or Control-click) the BreakMate app and select Open. 3. If it still blocks, go to **System Settings > Privacy & Security** and click **Allow Anyway** next to BreakMate.

Installation Note (macOS)

Since BreakMate is not notarized by Apple, macOS may show a security warning on first launch. Open System Settings > Privacy and Security and click Allow Anyway next to BreakMate.

item.title: Version 1.1.3
item.description:
# BreakMate v1.1.3 — Stability, Dev Isolation & Version Alignment
This update introduces critical fixes to resolve a startup crash and optimizes the developer experience by isolating telemetry in development environments.
### What's Changed
* **Startup Crash Fix:** Resolved a critical runtime exception (`Tried to use Provider with a subtype of Listenable/Stream`) by shifting the injection of `StatsService` inside `MultiProvider` to `ChangeNotifierProvider.value`. Subscribed widgets can now dynamically listen to background metrics calculations safely. * **Sentry Dev Mode Isolation:** Bypassed Sentry telemetry initialization in debug/profile builds using the `kReleaseMode` check. This completely silences verbose connection warnings and native SDK exceptions when developing locally. * **Sparkle Version Alignment:** Aligned all build metadata to version `1.1.3+28` to ensure that macOS users receive updates correctly without redundant update dialog prompts.
### Installation Note (macOS)
Since BreakMate is not notarized by Apple, macOS may show a security warning on first launch.
1. Double-click the BreakMate-Installer.dmg and drag BreakMate to your Applications folder. 2. Right-click (or Control-click) the BreakMate app and select Open. 3. If it still blocks, go to **System Settings > Privacy & Security** and click **Allow Anyway** next to BreakMate.

channel.title: Version 1.1.2
channel.description:
# BreakMate v1.1.2 — User Experience Polish & Smart Notifications
This update focuses on improving the break transition experience and enhancing visual feedback for smart detection features.
### What's Changed
* **Audio Transitions:** Added gentle lofi music fade-in/out during pre-break warnings for a smoother user experience. * **Meeting Detection Visuals:** Added real-time visual indicators to the companion (On-Air badge) and tray menu when meetings are detected. * **Micro-Break Integration:** Mapped posture and eye-blink tracking reminders directly to companion animations (stretching and blinking) for less intrusive healthy habits.
### Installation Note (macOS)
Since BreakMate is not notarized by Apple, macOS may show a security warning on first launch.
1. Double-click the BreakMate-Installer.dmg and drag BreakMate to your Applications folder. 2. Right-click (or Control-click) the BreakMate app and select Open. 3. If it still blocks, go to **System Settings > Privacy & Security** and click **Allow Anyway** next to BreakMate.

item.title: Version 1.1.1
item.description:
BreakMate v1.1.1

## BreakMate v1.1.1 — Minor Fixes & Improvements This is a small maintenance release with a few polish improvements and under-the-hood fixes. ### What's Changed * **Stability:** Fixed a minor edge case that could cause the break timer to reset unexpectedly when switching between apps rapidly. * **Performance:** Reduced memory footprint of the desktop companion window during long idle sessions. * **Pet behavior:** Smoothed out occasional animation stutter when the pet transitions between idle and sleeping states. ### Installation Note (macOS) Since BreakMate is not notarized by Apple, macOS may show a security warning on first launch. 1. Double-click the BreakMate-Installer.dmg and drag BreakMate to your Applications folder. 2. Right-click (or Control-click) the BreakMate app and select Open. 3. If it still blocks, go to System Settings > Privacy & Security and click Allow Anyway next to BreakMate.

Installation Note (macOS)

Since BreakMate is not notarized by Apple, macOS may show a security warning on first launch. Open System Settings > Privacy and Security and click Allow Anyway next to BreakMate.

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
BreakMate v1.1.0 — Performance Refactoring & Pet Fatigue

This update brings major performance improvements under the hood, upgrades to how state is synced across components, and the introduction of the new Pet Fatigue AI behavioral model.

AI Pet Fatigue (Phase 3.1)

  • Your companion pet now dynamically shows tired behavior as your day goes on. The behavioral decision engine tracks your cumulative work hours throughout the day.
  • If you have worked for 3 hours or more, the pet is much more likely to sleep or rest, while high-energy animations like running or jumping are naturally discouraged so the pet stays calm.

Isolate Exception Fix & Better Stability

  • Resolved the services library crash that was occurring in background isolate communication.
  • Implemented a proxy method channel pattern so that background polling operations for idle status and smart app detection run reliably on separate Dart threads without causing UI micro-stutters or engine crashes.

Isolate State Synchronization

  • Synced target end times and daily work totals across the main app and overlay components, making sure the companion desktop panel is always aligned with the main app status.

Core Code Refactoring (Phase 2.1)

  • Simplified the large monolithic TimerEngine class by breaking it down into smaller, focused modules: TimerStateData (state properties), TimerRepository (persistence), and TimerContextManager (focus mode and meeting detection).

Performance Optimization

  • Added aggressive memory cleanup by clearing pet theme image caches when switching pet selections.
  • Wrapped fast-ticking timer elements in RepaintBoundary widgets to avoid redrawing the entire companion overlay window unnecessarily.

Installation Note (macOS)

Since BreakMate is built independently and is not verified by Apple, macOS will show a security warning when you attempt to launch it for the first time.

  1. Double-click the BreakMate-Installer.dmg file and drag BreakMate to your Applications folder.
  2. Open your Applications folder, right-click (or Control-click) the BreakMate app, and select Open.
  3. If it still blocks launch, go to System Settings > Privacy & Security, scroll down to the Security section, and click Allow Anyway next to the BreakMate notice to authorize it.

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
⚡️ Version 1.0.1 — Performance & Stability Update

  • 🚀 Instant Launch: Parallel service initialization and shared Flutter engines make the app 10x faster.
  • 🛠 Reliable Updates: Fixed Sparkle update issues in macOS Sandboxed release builds.
  • 👀 20-20-20 Rule: Standardized default break pattern for better eye health.
  • 📈 Fluid Stats: Optimized statistics heatmap for zero-lag scrolling and viewing.
  • 🔔 Better Focus: Reminders no longer steal focus or interrupt your active application.

Update now for a smoother, faster BreakMate experience!

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
🚀 What's New in Version 1.0.0

  • ✨ Menu Bar Companion: Seamlessly runs in your macOS menu bar to remind you of healthy work habits.
  • 🐱 Desktop Pets: Interact with animated cats, dogs, and pixel pets while you work.
  • 🎵 Lofi Beats: Built-in lofi music player to help you stay focused during work sessions.
  • 📊 Analytics & Stats: Detailed charts to track your productivity and break trends over time.
  • 🛑 Smart Detection: Automatically detects meetings and respects your Focus Mode settings.
  • ⚡️ Hardened Runtime: Optimized for macOS performance with full securitysandboxing.

Enjoying BreakMate? Follow us on GitHub for more updates!
